commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Judge As if he would say: It is in vain to strive with them, or reprove them, they are so obstinate in evil. (Challoner)
Priest. Such must be slain, Deuteronomy xvii. 12. (Calmet)
Septuagint, "my people are like a priest contradicted "(Haydock) or degraded. (Theodoret)

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Let not any man judge: As if he would say: It is in vain to strive with them, or reprove them, they are so obstinate in evil.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
